wikitext: []: NGE OST II producer pamphlet translation?             Quote Post by gwern » Mon Sep 19, 2011 1:31 pm http://eva.onegeek.org/pipermail/oldeva/1999-March/027229.html "NGE II CD pamphlet translation" I s'pose I could look through the archives for this, but I haven't a clue where to start, or if I'd be wasting my time. Has someone translated the paragraph from the inside back page of the pamphlet of the second BGM CD? It's written by the producer from TV Tokyo. If not, I'll translate it... might be interesting...

Has someone translated the paragraph from the inside back page of the pamphlet of the second BGM CD? It's written by the producer from TV Tokyo. If not, I'll translate it... might be interesting...
